overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with blue hair and full-body tattoos walking through a futuristic urban plaza and under elevated highways. The environment features distinctive orange structural columns, teal benches, digital billboards, and transitions from open plaza to shaded underpass areas with homeless encampments.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with seating and landscaping under elevated structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the plaza, passing benches and planters with trees

notable_agents.action: person sitting on teal bench using a handheld device

entered.detail: massive orange structural columns supporting the elevated highway above
public seating with teal backs and yellow bases, some with graffiti
large rectangular planters containing trees and shrubs
piles of blue and gray garbage bags scattered on the ground
large illuminated advertising screen showing colorful graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a futuristic urban plaza with distinctive orange support pillars and teal public benches. The ground is paved with dark tiles, and white concrete planters with trees line the walkway. Trash bags are visible on the ground, suggesting urban decay. The camera moves forward through this semi-covered space with natural light filtering through.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area from plaza to street under elevated highway

events.description: exits the open plaza and approaches the street level under the elevated highway
enters deep shadow under the massive concrete overpass structure

agents.ego_description: walking toward the street under the overpass, navigating around structural columns

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with green accent lighting underneath
dark asphalt street surface with painted markings
tall metal poles with lighting fixtures
thick cylindrical support columns for the highway above

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the plaza to a street area beneath the elevated highway. The environment becomes more enclosed with massive concrete pillars and the highway structure overhead. Lighting shifts to a mix of artificial and filtered natural light. The ground changes from tiles to asphalt as the character approaches the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian crosswalk and sidewalk under elevated highway

events.description: character steps onto striped crosswalk and crosses the street
character transitions from walking to running briefly while navigating the space

agents.ego_description: crossing the striped crosswalk and continuing along the street under the overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright yellow outfit crossing the street
white sedan driving along the road under the highway

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt
curved concrete ramp connecting to the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: Moving through the shaded area under the highway, the character crosses a striped pedestrian crosswalk. The space is enclosed by concrete structures with artificial lighting. Other pedestrians in colorful cyberpunk attire walk in opposing directions, and vehicles pass by on the road. Digital billboards are visible on the walls of nearby buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane road with traffic under highway overpass

events.description: black sedan and other vehicles drive past on the road
approaching area with orange barriers and tent structures visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the road edge under the overpass, passing other pedestrians and observing traffic

notable_agents.action: person in pink tank top and gray pants standing on the sidewalk
black vintage-style sedan driving past the camera

entered.detail: low orange metal barriers lining the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking under the elevated highway alongside a road with moderate traffic. Orange barriers line the pedestrian walkway, and various vehicles including a black sedan pass by. The environment remains in deep shadow with artificial lighting from overhead fixtures. Pedestrians in futuristic clothing walk along the sidewalk, and the scene approaches a more open area with visible tent structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: homeless encampment under highway with tents and temporary shelters

events.description: enters tent encampment area with people resting on the ground
exits deep shade of overpass into brighter sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking through the encampment area, passing people resting on cardboard and near tents

notable_agents.action: person lying on cardboard boxes next to an orange couch
person with dark hair standing near camping tents

entered.detail: orange and white camping tents set up under the overpass
flattened cardboard boxes used as sleeping surfaces
low-rise beige building with dark windows and garage doors
steam or smoke rising from a vent in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a homeless encampment under the highway, where camping tents and cardboard shelters are set up on the concrete ground. People are seen resting and standing among the temporary structures. The lighting brightens as the area opens up to sunlight, revealing a beige building facade ahead and steam rising in the distance. The character walks through this space, passing by the encampment residents.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, futuristic urban plaza into the shadowed depths of an elevated highway underpass, eventually emerging into a sunlit homeless encampment. It begins by gliding through a semi-covered space characterized by orange support pillars, teal benches, and dark tiled paving. As the camera moves forward, the environment becomes more enclosed and the ground shifts to asphalt, transitioning the lighting from natural brightness to a mix of artificial glow and deep shadows beneath the massive concrete highway structure. The scene then expands across a striped pedestrian crosswalk filled with colorful pedestrians and passing vehicles, moving alongside orange barriers and digital billboards. Finally, the camera pushes through the shaded underpass into a more open area where cardboard shelters and tents line the concrete, with the lighting brightening again to reveal a beige building facade and rising steam in the distance.
